Good evening, and welcome to the Capital View Hotel. How can I help you?
Good evening. I have a reservation under the name Mansour. Could I have a quiet room on a high floor, please?
Of course. I have a room on the eighth floor. Here is your key card.
Thank you. Would it be possible to get a late check-out on my last day? My flight leaves in the evening.
That is no problem. I will note a late check-out for two in the afternoon.
Wonderful. One more thing: the air conditioning is a little too cold. Could you send someone to take a look?
Certainly. I will send someone right away. Is there anything else?
Just one: can you tell me the wifi password? Thank you so much for your help.
I have a reservation under the name Mansour.
Could you send someone to look at the air conditioning?
Can you tell me the wifi password?

Hello, and thank you for choosing the Capital View Hotel. This is the front desk with a message about your reservation. Your room is ready for check-in any time after three in the afternoon. Your room is on the eighth floor, and breakfast is served in the lobby from six to ten in the morning. If you need anything during your stay, please dial zero for the front desk. We can arrange a late check-out, extra towels, or a wake-up call. If you would like a quieter room, just let us know and we will be happy to help. We hope you enjoy your stay with us.

Good evening. I have a reservation under the name Mansour. I am here for the conference, so I will be staying for five nights. Could I have a quiet room on a high floor, please? Also, would it be possible to get a late check-out on my last day? My flight leaves in the evening. One more thing: the air conditioning in my room is a little too cold. Could you send someone to take a look? And could you tell me the password for the wifi? Thank you so much for your help. You have all been very kind.
